liveSection.topExperienceDesc: Professional dealers with you all the way, with HD live streaming that makes you feel the most authentic casino atmosphere.

member.contactUsDesc: 24/7 customer support, fast deposits, instant withdrawals, and top VIP service always on standby.

activity.title: Promotions Center
activity.subtitle: Endless promotions and rewards
activity.firstDepositDesc: Enjoy a great bonus on your first deposit
activity.checkinDesc: Check in daily to claim rewards
activity.risk1: Arbitrage, cashback abuse, and multi-accounting are prohibited. Violations result in account ban.
activity.risk2: All bonuses have wagering requirements. Withdrawal not available until requirements are met.
activity.risk3: LA1 reserves the right to final interpretation of this promotion.

firstDeposit.title: 🎁 First Deposit Bonus
firstDeposit.banner: Enjoy a great bonus on your first deposit
firstDeposit.bannerDesc: Get up to a 100% bonus boost
firstDeposit.claimSuccess: 🎁 First deposit bonus has been credited!
firstDeposit.claimFail: Failed to claim, please contact customer support
firstDeposit.rule1: This event is for new members' first deposit only, one claim per account
firstDeposit.rule2: Deposit 100 plan: 10x turnover (1,380 USDT) required for withdrawal
firstDeposit.rule3: Deposit 30 plan: 8x turnover (80 USDT) required for withdrawal
firstDeposit.rule4: Turnover must be completed within 7 days, otherwise bonus and profits will be cleared
firstDeposit.rule5: Profit cap from first deposit bonus is 5x the bonus amount
firstDeposit.rule7: Valid turnover: Bet ≥ 1 USDT, Odds ≥ 1.5 counts 100%, 1.3~1.5 counts 50%, < 1.3 counts 0%
firstDeposit.rule8: Baccarat requires at least 30 rounds to count towards valid turnover
firstDeposit.rule9: Hedging bets on the same event/round (e.g. Banker and Player) do not count
firstDeposit.rule10: One claim per IP/device, multiple accounts will result in bonus deduction and ban
firstDeposit.rule11: This event cannot be combined with other promotions
firstDeposit.rule12: LA1 reserves the right to cancel rewards and ban accounts for arbitrage or turnover abuse

vip.title: 👑 VIP Club
vip.desc: Auto-upgrade with cumulative bets, enjoy top VIP benefits

referral.title: 🤝 Referral Commission
referral.rule1: Earn a commission for every friend who successfully registers and deposits
referral.rule2: Commission rate is calculated based on your friend's first deposit amount
referral.rule3: Commissions are credited in real-time and can be withdrawn directly
referral.desc: Invite friends for permanent commission, no limits
referral.loginToSee: Login to see your invite code

checkin.title: 📅 Daily Check-in
checkin.rule1: Resets daily at 00:00 (UTC+8), you can check in for the current day
checkin.rule2: Check-ins must be consecutive. If interrupted, it will restart from Day 1
checkin.rule3: Check-in rewards can be withdrawn after meeting a 2x wagering requirement
checkin.rule4: After 7 consecutive days of check-in, it will restart from Day 1 on the 8th day
checkin.subtitle: 7 Consecutive Days · Up to 3 USDT
checkin.desc: Daily check-in rewards increase, get 3 USDT on day 7

tasks.title: 📋 Daily Tasks
tasks.task1Desc: Complete by logging into your account
tasks.task2Desc: Complete one round in any game
tasks.task4Desc: Successfully invite a friend to register
tasks.subtitle: Betting Tasks · Referral Tasks
tasks.desc: Complete tasks for rewards, up to 5 USDT per task

weekend.title: 🎉 Weekend Bonus
weekend.bannerDesc: Limited to every Saturday and Sunday, with extra bonus boosts
weekend.rule1: Only valid on Saturdays and Sundays
weekend.rule2: Bonus rewards are automatically credited to your account
weekend.rule3: Can be withdrawn after meeting the corresponding wagering requirements
weekend.subtitle: Weekend Cashback +30%
weekend.desc: VIP2+ members get extra 30% cashback on weekend bets

deposit.title: 💰 Deposit/Withdraw
deposit.notice1: Please confirm the correct transfer network
deposit.notice3: Deposit processing time is about 1-5 minutes
deposit.withdrawNotice2: Withdrawal processing time is about 5-30 minutes
deposit.withdrawNotice3: Please contact customer support if you have any questions

service.title: 💬 Support Center
service.subtitle: 24/7 service for you
service.faq1Ans: Please go to the deposit page, select the amount and payment method to complete the deposit.
service.faq2Ans: Please contact Telegram support @LA1111_bot for withdrawal operations.
service.faq3: What if I forget my password?
service.faq3Ans: Please contact customer support to help reset your password.

service.fillRequired: Please fill in subject and content
service.ticketSubmitted: ✅ Ticket submitted, we will reply soon!
service.subjectPlaceholder: e.g.: Deposit issue, withdrawal delay, account problem...
